text:
また頼みがある！
まあ、そう身構えずに聞いてくれ。
オレと君の仲じゃないか！

君の戦闘記録を参考に
資料にまとめたいのだが……
ハッキリ言って、苦手だ！

そこで、部下への指導が
行き届いていそうなアークスに
アドバイスをもらいたい！

だが、オレが聞きにいくと
身構えてしまうかもしれないので
君に聞いてきてもらいたい。

ああそうだ、さらに
「指導される側」の意見もあれば
より参考になると思わないか？

指導される側の代表は
ストラトスがいいだろう！
よろしく頼むぞ！

Please! Just hear me out before you run away.
We're friends here, right? It's just one tiny
little favor!

See, I want to work all your combat logs into
handy reference material, but... Well, to put
it simply, I'm miserable at all of this!

So I want to is ask for the perspective of some
of the other operatives. Ones that have an
easier time of leading their teams!

But I can't just go ask myself, right? It would
unsettle people to see the Combat Commander
come begging. So I want you to do it.

Oh, and now that I think of it, it would
probably help to hear how the rank-and-file feel
about taking all those orders, too.

Stratos would probably be a good person to
ask about that! I owe you for this! Really!
